# Sprint 7.2 Data Privacy

**Sprint:** Sprint 7. Security And Governance
**Objective:** Implement security and governance, including access control, data masking, encryption, and auditable access logs.

## Description
Implement data privacy measures, including pseudonymized identifiers, encrypted storage and transport, and auditable access logs.

## Deliverable
Implemented data privacy measures
